name: beui-wheel-picker
title: Momentum Wheel Picker
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Selects a value through a 3D wheel with drag, wheel, keyboard, momentum, and optional audio ticks.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Exposed the custom wheel as a labeled spinbutton with current value metadata.
Labeled the reduced-motion button group, marked its current value, and returned no control for an empty option list.
Guarded pointer capture and release for synthetic or cancelled pointer input.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports and corrected the custom picker semantics and pointer-capture edge cases.
modifications.reason: Keep the component portable and give assistive technology the same value state available visually.
